title: AGY-431: Scale & Immutable DevOps (L400)
author: tridorian Labs & Google Cloud
description: An advanced, hands-on masterclass for DevOps Leads and Platform Engineers. Master the architecture, deployment, and orchestration of containerized Google Antigravity environments (agy-box) across remote cloud VMs. Learn how to configure private container registries behind restrictive corporate proxies, manage TLS/SSL certificate injection, and implement secure headless CI/CD execution loops with strict policy enforcement.

features.title: Immutable Sandboxing
features.description: Establish bulletproof isolation for autonomous agents using hardened OCI agy-box containers with read-only filesystems and capability drops.

features.title: Enterprise Proxy Integration
features.description: Master certificate injection, HTTP/HTTPS proxy routing, and authentication bypass rules for air-gapped corporate environments.

features.title: Headless CI/CD Orchestration
features.description: Build automated, non-interactive execution pipelines with the agy CLI, custom timeout handlers, and structural status checks.
